title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Anarock Property Consultants - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Anarock Property Consultants - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Anarock Property Consultants in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Anarock Property Consultants:
Anarock Property Consultants is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anarock Property Consultants!
